What We Build

AI Tools That Work While You Sleep

Every tool is custom-built for your workflow. No off-the-shelf software — just automation that fits how you already work.

description

Document Automation

AI pre-fills forms, extracts data from documents, and routes paperwork — turning hours of manual work into minutes.

translate

Bilingual Summaries & Routing

Plain-language document summaries in multiple languages. Automated translation routing for certified foreign-language documents.

verified_user

Compliance & Verification

Automated eligibility checks, credential verification, and compliance monitoring — triggered at the right moment.

receipt_long

Billing & Revenue Tools

Automated billing summaries, error detection, underpayment alerts, and plain-language client explanations.

assignment

Intake & Onboarding

AI processes incoming forms, extracts key data, and routes it to the right systems — zero manual data entry.

smart_toy

Custom AI Assistants

Purpose-built AI tools trained on your processes, terminology, and workflows — answering questions and handling tasks 24/7.

The Process

From Call to Live in One Week

No long contracts. No complex implementations. Just results.

01

Free Audit

We review your current workflow and show you exactly where automation will save you time and money.

02

Discovery Call

20 minutes. Walk us through your day-to-day operations. We identify what should run on autopilot.

03

Custom Build

We build your AI tools in one week, tailored to your business. Flat fee, no surprises.

04

Deploy & Support

Tools go live alongside your existing systems. We train your team and provide ongoing support.

Headquartered in the Midwest. Serving Businesses Nationwide.

I build custom AI automation tools for businesses that are drowning in documentation and manual workflows. Every tool I deploy is built specifically for your operation — no templates, no generic software. Flat fee, live in one week, running alongside whatever systems you already use.

Through my document authentication company, American Apostille, I've spent years helping firms and professionals navigate complex paperwork — which is why Brahka Labs knows exactly where the bottlenecks live.
